posts.text: Good news tonight: The Administration is releasing the funding for the Blatnik Bridge replacement. We made the case to two Administrations on why this funding is crucial, and now this important project can move forward without delay.

Honored to earn the support of End Citizens United. At a time when our democracy is facing unprecedented challenges, I will continue to fight to protect Minnesotans' freedom to vote and make sure we have fair and secure elections.

From Kellogg, which saw 25 inches of snow, to the Twin Cities and across our state, Minnesotans are stepping up to help seniors and others remove snow.

Video

Americans already struggling with rising costs are now facing higher gasoline prices. Meanwhile, this Administration hasn’t made the case for this war or laid out a strategic path forward.

This is not leadership.
Today is St. Patrick’s Day—and my mom’s birthday. She was named Rose after  “My Wild Irish Rose.” Thinking of her today.

We don’t need any more backroom deals that benefit corporations. We need lower prices.

That's why I'm introducing legislation to ensure that courts have the tools to review antitrust settlements and approve only those that are fair to consumers and small businesses.


Variety (@Variety)

After ‘Weak’ Live Nation-DOJ Settlement, Senator Amy Klobuchar Introduces Antitrust Accountability and Transparency Act variety.com/2026/music/news/…

Happy St. Patrick’s Day! 🍀 Wishing everyone across Minnesota a great day—including those headed to the St. Paul parade. Stay warm, stay safe, and have a wonderful time celebrating this incredible Minnesota tradition.

SCIENCE MATTERS.

Congrats to the Gopher Women’s Basketball team on a great season and a 4-seed in the NCAA Tournament.

A Minnesota–Green Bay matchup during March Madness? Sounds like a good way to start the tournament. 🏀

Across-the-board tariffs are raising costs for small businesses, farmers, and families.

I introduced legislation to stop the administration from continuing these tariffs so we can bring down costs and get our economy back on track.

wadenapj.com/news/local/klob…

"All the Empty Rooms" speaks to an experience that has become too universal. The children murdered in these shootings have left a heartbreaking void. Parents from Uvalde to Annunciation understand this pain.

Such a deserving Oscar win and such an important story.


Good Morning America (@GMA)

The Oscar for Best Documentary Short Film goes to “All the Empty Rooms.” #Oscars

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/GMA/status/2033352192912937021#m

In true Minnesota fashion, people are stepping up to help one another through this winter storm—from pushing cars out of drifts to lending a hand to stranded drivers.

Video

Washington Post headline:

Trump backs FCC chief’s threat to broadcasters, criticizing Iran war coverage 
Hey, if the President can’t handle the true coverage about his war and his gas prices, why not come before Congress and tell us the endgame. The media will cover verbatim.

Truth.


Kyle Cheney (@kyledcheney)

Donald Trump just posted a lot of words about the Supreme Court and other courts — many of which were not true. 

1) The court did not bless his alternative tariff plan
2) The 2020 election was not “conclusively shown to be stolen
3) The court did not say Trump lacked “standing” in 2020. It said Texas did not have standing.

The rest is one of the most incendiary attacks on the court in memory.

truthsocial.com/@realDonaldT…




— https://nitter.net/kyledchen

A good day to win a winter sport! Team USA Para ice hockey takes gold, completing historic sweep for U.S. hockey across Olympic and Paralympic Games. Congrats to Team USA—including Minnesotans Liam Cunningham and Landon Uthke. 🇺🇸 🏒


NBC Olympics & Paralympics (@NBCOlympics)

USA Hockey heard it was time for some spring cleaning. 🧹🦅





— https://nitter.net/NBCOlympics/status/2033229672654262457#m

After the health care tax credits expired, 1 in 3 Americans—about 82 million people—are skipping meals, delaying care, or borrowing money just to pay medical bills.

That’s why we’ve been fighting to restore the health care tax credits, so people aren't forced to make impossible choices.

Melissa Hortman worked to create Minnesota’s Community Solar Garden Program—opening the door for more families to benefit from clean energy. The Minnesota House just passed a bill unanimously to name the program in her honor.

A fitting way to honor her legacy.

What began as a simple idea between friends 50 years ago grew into one of Duluth’s most iconic destinations. Happy 50th anniversary to Grandma’s Saloon & Grill!

duluthnewstribune.com/busine…

Congratulations to Lake Elmo’s Sydney Peterson on winning Paralympic GOLD in the women’s 10km classic standing race! 🥇🇺🇸

An incredible achievement and another proud moment for Minnesota.  

mprnews.org/story/2026/03/11…

No one serving the public should be able to use confidential government information for financial gain.

I introduced legislation with Senator Merkley to ban federal officials from trading on prediction markets and crack down on corruption.
